zh.East Witton, North Yorkshire, England, U: 英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾易亞斯特 維頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Stavelegh於大約1200年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親Adam de Stavelegh37歲，母親Alice de Percy36歲。她於大約1215年與Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1253年11月11日在英國越可爾約克享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾。

zh-hans.East Witton, North Yorkshire, England, U: 英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾易亞斯特 維頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Stavelegh于大约1200年出生在英国越可爾时，她的父亲Adam de Stavelegh37岁，母亲Alice de Percy36岁。她于大约1215年与Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1253年11月11日在英国越可爾約克享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Stavelegh was born about 1200, in Yorkshire, England, her father, Adam de Stavelegh, was 37 and her mother, Alice de Percy, was 36. She married Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth about 1215, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 11 November 1253, in York, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Stavelegh est née environ 1200, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Adam de Stavelegh, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Alice de Percy, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth environ 1215, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 11 novembre 1253, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Stavelegh um 1200 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adam de Stavelegh 37 und ihre Mutter Alice de Percy 36. Sie hat um 1215 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 11. November 1253 im Alter von 54 Jahren in York, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Stavelegh è nata il circa 1200 nel Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Adam de Stavelegh, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Alice de Percy, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth circa 1215, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 11 novembre 1253, nel York, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Staveleghが約1200年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Adam de Staveleghは37歳，母Alice de Percyは36歳であった。約1215年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでRandolph FitzHenry of Ravensworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1253年11月11日にイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.East Witton, North Yorkshire, England, U: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 이스트 윗튼
ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Stavelegh(이)가 대략 1200년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam de Stavelegh(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Percy(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 대략 1215년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1253년 11월 11일 영국 요르크실르 요르크에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Stavelegh nasceu aproximadamente 1200, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adam de Stavelegh, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Percy, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth aproximadamente 1215, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 11 de novembro de 1253, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.East Witton, North Yorkshire, England, U: эаст виттон, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Stavelegh родилась около 1200 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Adam de Stavelegh было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Percy, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth около 1215 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 11 ноября 1253 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth aproximadamente 1215, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 11 de noviembre de 1253, en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
